from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    hex_color = hex_color.lstrip('#')
    return RGBColor(int(hex_color[0:2], 16), int(hex_color[2:4], 16), int(hex_color[4:6], 16))


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

COLOR_PRIMARY_BLUE = hex_to_rgb('#2E86AB')
COLOR_SECONDARY_GREEN = hex_to_rgb('#A23B72')
COLOR_ACCENT_YELLOW = hex_to_rgb('#F18F01')
COLOR_LIGHT_BG = hex_to_rgb('#FFF9F0')
COLOR_DARK_TEXT = hex_to_rgb('#2C3E50')
COLOR_WHITE = hex_to_rgb('#FFFFFF')
COLOR_CARD_BG = hex_to_rgb('#FFFFFF')
COLOR_ACCENT_ORANGE = hex_to_rgb('#E67E22')
COLOR_SOFT_BLUE = hex_to_rgb('#D6EAF8')


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg_color = hex_to_rgb(color_hex) if isinstance(color_hex, str) else color_hex
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add...
